lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਰਸਿ ਮਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar har ke gun gaavai bhagat prem ras maataa |
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, absorbed in loving devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਖ ਸੋਗ ਦੁਹੁ ਮਾਹਿ ਨਿਰਾਲਾ ਕਰਣੈਹਾਰੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: harakh sog duhu maeh niraalaa karanaihaar pachhaataa |2|
lines.english: He remains unaffected by both fortune and misfortune, and he recognizes the Creator Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਾ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਰਖਿ ਲੀਆ ਸਗਲ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਬਣਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis kaa saa tin hee rakh leea sagal jugat ban aaee |
lines.english: The Lord saves those who belong to Him, and all pathways are opened to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪੁਰਖ ਦਇਆਲਾ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੩॥੧॥੯॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak prabh purakh deaalaa keemat kehan na jaaee |3|1|9|
lines.english: Says Nanak, the value of the Merciful Lord God cannot be described. ||3||1||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਦੁਪਦੇ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 dupade ghar 2 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl, Dho-Padhay, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਰਨੁ ਜਾਤਿ ਕੋਊ ਪੂਛੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਬਾਛਹਿ ਚਰਨ ਰਵਾਰੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: baran jaat koaoo poochhai naahee baachheh charan ravaaro |1|
lines.english: No one asks about their ancestry and social status; instead, they yearn for the dust of their feet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰ ਲੀਏ ਕਰਿ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਸਗਲ ਕਰਤ ਨਮਸਕਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: patit pavitr lee kar apune sagal karat namasakaaro |
lines.english: The Lord has sanctified the sinners and made them His own; all bow in reverence to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰ ਐਸੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur aiso naam tumaaro |
lines.english: O Lord Master, such is Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਕੋ ਧਣੀ ਕਹੀਜੈ ਜਨ ਕੋ ਅੰਗੁ ਨਿਰਾਰੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sagal srisatt ko dhanee kaheejai jan ko ang niraaro |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are called the Lord of all creation; You give Your unique support to Your servant. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਬੁਧਿ ਪਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਆਧਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasang naanak budh paaee har keeratan aadhaaro |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, Nanak has obtained understanding; singing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises is his only support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮਦੇਉ ਤ੍ਰਿਲੋਚਨੁ ਕਬੀਰ ਦਾਸਰੋ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਭਇਓ ਚੰਮਿਆਰੋ ॥੨॥੧॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naamadeo trilochan kabeer daasaro mukat bheo chamiaaro |2|1|10|
lines.english: The Lord's servants, Naam Dayv, Trilochan, Kabeer and Ravi Daas the shoe-maker have been liberated. ||2||1||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਊ ਬੂਝਨਹਾਰੋ ਜਾਨੈ ਕਵਨੁ ਭਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: hai naahee koaoo boojhanahaaro jaanai kavan bhataa |
lines.english: No one understands the Lord; who can understand His plans?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਵ ਬਿਰੰਚਿ ਅਰੁ ਸਗਲ ਮੋਨਿ ਜਨ ਗਹਿ ਨ ਸਕਾਹਿ ਗਤਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: siv biranch ar sagal mon jan geh na sakaeh gataa |1|
lines.english: Shiva, Brahma and all the silent sages cannot understand the state of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਅਗਮ ਅਗਾਧਿ ਕਥਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kee agam agaadh kathaa |
lines.english: God's sermon is profound and unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨੀਐ ਅਵਰ ਅਵਰ ਬਿਧਿ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਬਕਨ ਕਥਨ ਰਹਤਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: suneeai avar avar bidh bujheeai bakan kathan rahataa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is heard to be one thing, but He is understood to be something else again; He is beyond description and explanation. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਭਗਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਆਪਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape bhagataa aap suaamee aapan sang rataa |
lines.english: He Himself is the devotee, and He Himself is the Lord and Master; He is imbued with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਹੈ ਪੇਖਿਓ ਜਤ੍ਰ ਕਤਾ ॥੨॥੨॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ko prabh poor rahio hai pekhio jatr kataa |2|2|11|
lines.english: Nanak's God is pervading and permeating everywhere; wherever he looks, He is there. ||2||2||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਾ ਮਸੂਰਤਿ ਅਵਰ ਸਿਆਨਪ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਆਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: mataa masoorat avar siaanap jan kau kachhoo na aaeo |
lines.english: The humble servant of the Lord has no plans, politics or other clever tricks.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੋ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲੁ ਬਿਰਦਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: prabh ko bhagat vachhal biradaaeo |
lines.english: It is the very nature of God to love His devotees;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਜਹ ਅਉਸਰੁ ਆਇ ਬਨਿਓ ਹੈ ਤਹਾ ਤਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਓ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeh jeh aausar aae banio hai tahaa tahaa har dhiaaeo |1|
lines.english: Whenever the occasion arises, there, he meditates on the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪ ਤਪ ਸੰਜਮ ਕਰਮ ਧਰਮ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਜਨਿ ਗਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: jap tap sanjam karam dharam har keeratan jan gaaeo |
lines.english: The Lord's servant sings the Kirtan of His Praises as his worship, deep meditation, self-discipline and religious observances.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲ ਬਾਰਿਕ ਕੀ ਨਿਆਈ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਲਾਡ ਲਡਾਇਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kare pratipaal baarik kee niaaee jan kau laadd laddaaeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He cherishes His servant, and caresses him as His own child. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਨਿ ਪਰਿਓ ਨਾਨਕ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕੀ ਅਭੈ ਦਾਨੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਓ ॥੨॥੩॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: saran pario naanak tthaakur kee abhai daan sukh paaeo |2|3|12|
lines.english: Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of his Lord and Master, and has received the blessings of fearlessness and peace. ||2||3||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰਿ ਭਾਵਨੀ ਲਾਈਐ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਮਾਨੁ ਹਾਠੀਲਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sant sevaa kar bhaavanee laaeeai tiaag maan haattheelaa |1|
lines.english: Serve the Saints with loving faith, and set aside your pride and stubbornness. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਆਰਾਧਹੁ ਪਿਆਰੋ ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਕੀਜੈ ਢੀਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: din raatee aaraadhahu piaaro nimakh na keejai dteelaa |
lines.english: Worship the Lord in adoration, day and night, O my dear - do not delay for a moment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਮਾਨ ਰਾਗੀਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: mohan praan maan raageelaa |
lines.english: The fascinating, playful Lord is my very breath of life and honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਸਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਹੀਅਰੇ ਕੈ ਸੰਗੇ ਪੇਖਿ ਮੋਹਿਓ ਮਨੁ ਲੀਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: baas rahio heeare kai sange pekh mohio man leelaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He abides in my heart; beholding His playful games, my mind is fascinated. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਮਨਿ ਹੋਤ ਅਨੰਦਾ ਉਤਰੈ ਮਨਹੁ ਜੰਗੀਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis simarat man hot anandaa utarai manahu jangeelaa |
lines.english: Remembering Him, my mind is in bliss, and the rust of my mind is removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੂਜਰੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: goojaree mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Goojaree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਬੇ ਕੀ ਮਹਿਮਾ ਬਰਨਿ ਨ ਸਾਕਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਰੈ ਪਰੀਲਾ ॥੨॥੪॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: milabe kee mahimaa baran na saakau naanak parai pareelaa |2|4|13|
lines.english: The great honor of meeting the Lord cannot be described; O Nanak, it is infinite, beyond measure. ||2||4||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਨਿ ਦੇਵ ਅਰੁ ਕੋੜਿ ਤੇਤੀਸਾ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਹੈਰਤਿ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਰਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: teen dev ar korr teteesaa tin kee hairat kachh na rahee |1|
lines.english: The three gods, and the 330,000,000 demi-gods, were astonished. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਨਿ ਜੋਗੀ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰਗਿ ਕਹਾਵਤ ਸਭ ਕੀਨੑੇ ਬਸਿ ਅਪਨਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: mun jogee saasatrag kahaavat sabh keenae bas apanahee |
lines.english: They call themselves silent sages, Yogis and scholars of the Shaastras, but Maya has has them all under her control.
